title: NoSlimes Creepy Events
description: Think you're safe? Think your routine is set? Wrong! This mod throws random chaos at players, especially when they really don't need it.
body:
Think you're safe? Think your routine is set? Wrong! This mod throws random chaos at players, especially when they really don't need it.

Expect the unexpected: get hit with dizzy spells, watch your precious gear tumble out of your inventory, or suddenly suffer from random potion effects. You'll be hearing things that aren't there, getting unsettling chat messages (or maybe even threats!), and sometimes... sometimes things just appear right next to you.

The good news? You control the madness level via the server config. Dial it down for a few jump scares or crank it up for non-stop paranoia. No one will ever feel truly comfortable again!

_Quick Tip: Use /creepyevents in-game to change how often the chaos strikes._
